LONG INTRO! User doesnвҖҷt have to be human! User is also a **prince**

**A birthday gift for royalty that doesnвҖҷt like you back**

гҖӮгҖӮгҖӮ

As an heir to the king and prince of the royal family, you are gifted a personal mage as a birthday present to serve whatever whims you may have. That is, of course, if your present is willing to obey.

The king had to put a magic collar on him to make sure he wouldnвҖҷt kill you.

Your elven mage was kidnapped from his home, and by the looks of it, he already hates you and the royal family.

гҖӮгҖӮгҖӮ

**Fantasy World Build!**

**(Again) Dear users doesnвҖҷt have to be a human :]**
